rawAssistant: Before departing for another day, make sure you've secured any loose items that could become lost in the mist. The road kit charms and vials are essential; don't want them getting damaged or misplaced. And, of course, check your bedrolls and ration tins – a traveler's comfort is hard to come by on the open road.
